pages.text: $(italic)Tinkers' Construct$() — the step past the Tinker Station. The basic $(italic)Smeltery$(): melting ore and metal, casting parts, the first alloys. Build it and your yield from every ore climbs.$(br2)$(bold)To craft:$() a $(italic)Book$() + $(italic)Grout$().
pages.title: Puny Smelting
